name: Maxi Cab Melbourne
title: Maxi Cab Melbourne | Maxi Taxi, 7, 11 & 13 Seater Booking
description: Book a Melbourne maxi cab or maxi taxi for group travel, luggage, events, appointments, airport runs, cruise transfers, and outer-suburb trips.
intro: A maxi cab or maxi taxi is the right choice when a standard taxi is too small. It keeps passengers, luggage, mobility equipment, shopping, sports gear, airport bags, and event groups together in one planned vehicle.
bestFor: Maxi taxi and maxi cab bookings

faq.q: Is a maxi taxi the same as a maxi cab in Melbourne?
faq.a: Many customers use both terms for a larger taxi. When booking, the important details are passenger count, luggage, child-seat requests, accessibility needs, and pickup timing.

faq.q: Can I pre-book a maxi cab for later?
faq.a: Yes. Pre-booking is recommended for early mornings, events, airport runs, wheelchair-accessible trips, and outer-suburb pickups.

name: Taxi Melbourne
title: Taxi Melbourne | Pre-Book Standard, Maxi, SUV & Airport Taxi
description: Pre-book Melbourne taxi transport for local trips, airport transfers, maxi taxis, SUV and wagon taxis, baby-seat requests, wheelchair access, parcels, and events.
intro: Melbourne taxi bookings are not all the same. A short city ride, airport transfer, family trip, wheelchair request, parcel delivery, and 7-passenger maxi taxi each need different vehicle planning.

faq.q: Can I pre-book a taxi in Melbourne?
faq.a: Yes. Melbourne taxi bookings can be pre-booked with pickup time, destination, passenger count, luggage, and any vehicle requirements.

faq.q: Can one booking request cover standard taxis and maxi taxis?
faq.a: Yes. The booking details help decide whether a standard taxi, SUV, wagon, maxi taxi, wheelchair-accessible vehicle, or family taxi is the right fit.

intro: Airport taxi bookings need more than a pickup address. Flight time, terminal, luggage, passengers, child seats, wheelchair access, and route timing all affect which vehicle is suitable.

faq.q: Can I book a taxi to Melbourne Airport in advance?
faq.a: Yes. Airport taxi bookings should include flight time, terminal, pickup address, passengers, luggage, and any child-seat or accessibility notes.

faq.q: Is a maxi taxi useful for airport transfers?
faq.a: Yes. Maxi taxis are useful for airport trips with groups, families, prams, sports gear, or multiple suitcases.

faq.a: Yes. Wheelchair, mobility scooter, carer, and equipment details should be included so the correct vehicle can be allocated.

name: SUV & Wagon Taxi Melbourne

description: Melbourne SUV and wagon taxi bookings for passengers who need extra luggage room, comfort, airport transfers, family trips, and business travel.

faq.q: When should I book an SUV or wagon instead of a maxi cab?
faq.a: An SUV or wagon can suit smaller groups with extra luggage. A maxi cab is better for larger passenger counts or bulky equipment.

faq.a: Yes. Silver service usually focuses on a premium sedan or similar vehicle, while maxi cabs focus on larger passenger and luggage capacity.
